svg.text: ▸ ZSwap proof verify → commitment tree + nullifier set updated
▸ Night UTXO signature verify → UTXO set updated
▸ DUST proof verify → DUST trees updated
▸ binding_commitment check (ties all three token ledgers)
▸ Guaranteed contract calls → non-rollbackable receipts dispatched
to contract shard; contract ZK proof verified on that shard, not shard 0
Fixed circuits (ZSwap, DUST) are ideal ProtoGalaxy folding targets | cost: bounded ≈ 10–20 ms/tx
▸ Night UTXO spend/create (staged; invisible to other txns)
▸ FAILURE receipt → roll back provisional state ✗
Rollback is intra-shard — no cross-shard coordination needed
Each fallible segment calls at most one contract (no AND-atomicity)
Staging set prevents double-spend against provisional UTXOs
Night UTXOs, ZSwap coins, and DUST live exclusively on Shard 0.
Hoarfrost (persistent MPT, O(1) clone) provides underlying storage.
Shard 0 is the sole token-state authority; its cost profile is bounded and predictable.
▸ Contract ZK proof verification (verifier key lookup)
▸ balance map updated (Night / ZSwap / DUST amounts)
Proof verified here, not on Shard 0 — keeps Shard 0 cost bounded
Cost: variable (5 ms – seconds depending on contract complexity)
On completion, sends receipt to Shard 0:
Receipt travels back across the shard boundary to Shard 0.
Shard 0 commits or rolls back provisional state based on receipt outcome.
For a guaranteed call the receipt is non-rollbackable regardless of outcome.
Provisional state staged for each fallible segment
Action receipts dispatched to contract shard ╌╌▶
Rollback is intra-shard-0; no cross-shard coordination is required for token state.
